negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. name: common_sense_cce9482d-88fc-4edd-9a92-061f6b568291
prompt: A close-up video showcases a variety of fruits and vegetables stored in rectangular pans, half-covered in cellophane, under bright artificial lighting. The first pan, almost empty, holds sliced pineapples with a yellow hue. To its right, a nearly full pan is filled with cherry tomatoes, their glossy surfaces reflecting the light above. The third pan contains green beans, their slender forms overlapping in various directions. A final pan of broccoli, with vibrant, textured tops, sits next to the beans. The black ceramic handle of an object is visible to the right of the broccoli. The camera captures this arrangement from a high angle, panning right across the long line of containers. Each metal container is nested within another, resting on a white table. Reflected in the cellophane, the bulbs above create two round spheres of light across the broccoli. The camera tilts up slightly towards the end before coming to a stop.
